title: TFC More Items
description: additional metal, leather elements for advanced recipes
body:
# TFC More Items 
## add-on that complements items such as

- heavy sheets
- foils
- gears
- stamens
- screws, nails, rivets
- rings
- wires

### "TFC IE Addon" and "Firmalife" metals compatibility

the add-on was created for the HardRock modpack to supplement recipes and expand creative possibilities.
Items have their own recipes for TFC Anvil, melting  they also work with Vanilla Minecraft
 _== if you use vanilla you will need to add your own crafting recipes ==_


 ![split](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YQibRpfp/images/2806c2ea2511fcdc87d6177eac8ce3019c9de53f.png)
